title: Operate as a self-contained local classifier
description: Every first-release CLASSIFY workflow runs inside the Tally process under the owner OS identity with no required remote or background component.
target: 100% of CLASSIFY acceptance workflows complete with network access disabled, non-interactively, and with no CLASSIFY or Tally daemon, watcher, scheduler, or background process running before or after invocation.
load_condition: Direct owner CLI use and AI Agent Host invocation across evaluation, rule management, validation, apply, feedback, status, abandon, and cleanup.
measurement: Network-denied published-binary acceptance suite, process inventory before and after each command, and prompt/TTY detection.
rationale: The selected approach and privacy boundary require explicit local commands rather than hidden automation.
